name: happy-bugfix
title: Fix off-by-one error in pagination
prompt: There is an off-by-one error in src/paginate.ts — the `getPage` function uses `slice(offset, offset + limit)` but `offset` is calculated as `page * limit` instead of `(page - 1) * limit`, so page 1 skips the first `limit` items. Fix the offset calculation and add a test that verifies page 1 returns the first `limit` items.
